basics.name: Chiriac Sebastian Casian
basics.label: Software Engineer
basics.summary: Software engineer with experience building production AI agents, cloud-native backend services, observability infrastructure, and evaluation pipelines.

education.area: Computer Science & Engineering with Quantum Science & Quantum Information Specialization
courses: OOP Project: Full-stack expense splitter (Spring Boot, JavaFX)
Interpreter with desugarer & type checker in Scala; Ray tracer in C++ with OpenGL
Quantum Engineering Project: Implemented a quantum K-Nearest Neighbours classifier.

work.name: Ekkie.ai
highlights: Implemented a production multi-stage LLM agent with the Microsoft Agent (MAF) framework  containing a deterministic planner an executor and a resolution checker workflow with conditional edges and human-in-the-loop approval gates on high-risk mcp tool calls that autonomously resolves Microsoft 365 IT support tickets at a 92% resolution rate, measured by a custom evaluation pipeline that drove continuous agent improvement.

Built and operated the entire multi-tenant production platform on Microsoft Azure (Container Apps, Cosmos NoSQL DB (with DiskANN) vector search powering some custom documentation search tools), Key Vault, Blob Storage, and Azure AI Foundry all secured with keyless OIDC and managed-identity auth and delivered via GitHub Actions CI/CD with automated deploy and one-click rollback.

Built end-to-end observability and incident-response infrastructure using OpenTelemetry, distributed tracing, structured logging, health checks, and Azure Application Insights/Log Analytics, enabling rapid root-cause analysis, proactive production monitoring, and incident.io incident response
Tech stack: Kotlin (Spring Boot), Azure cloud computing platform, Python (Microsoft Agent Framework), TypeScript (React)

work.name: JetBrains
highlights: Designed and implemented embeddings-based semantic similarity metrics (via cosine similarity) to evaluate plain-text AI completions, expanding evaluation coverage beyond deterministic code-based metrics.

Improved observability by adding new telemetry metrics and an interactive HTML dashboard that aggregated large evaluation reports data, making high-volume evaluation reports diagnosable at a glance and making it possible to spot high-level systemic problems

Was responsible for the TeamCity-based AI evaluation pipeline by diagnosing regressions, pinpointing root causes, and resolving pipeline issues to improve build stability and pass rates, served as the primary resource for engineers running experiments and onboarding to the evaluation infrastructure
Tech stack: Kotlin, TeamCity CI/CD & Buildserver, Java, Python

work.name: WTSS
highlights: Created a distributed, event-driven orchestration system using RabbitMQ to coordinate microservices and containerized E2E test workers, enabling reliable asynchronous execution, workload distribution, and e2e test scheduling

Achieved reliable programmatic control of physical mobile devices and emulators from containerized environments by integrating Playwright and Appium into a Docker workers, enabling fully automated e2e test execution.
Tech stack: Java (Spring Boot), RabbitMQ, TypeScript (React), Playwright, Appium, Docker

projects.name: Automated E2E Testing Platform with TeamCity Integration
projects.description: A platform for creating & scheduling e2e tests for web, mobile and API applications, that simulates e2e tests on physical devices and emulators (via Playwright and Appium), automatically monitors application health, and alerts on specific e2e step failures.

projects.name: Commit Scheduler
projects.description: A published IntelliJ IDEA plugin with 200+ downloads that schedules the push date of your commits on a highly configurable, predefined schedule.

projects.name: AI AutoComplete Caching
projects.description: An IntelliJ IDEA plugin that caches AI-generated code autocompletions using a Trie (prefix tree) data structure.

awards.title: NSS Space Settlement contest - Gold medal(1st place)
American Computer Science League - Silver Medal
